programme.title: Salón México
programme.desc: Mercedes (Marga Lopez) dances for money with the clients of Salon Mexico, a famous cabaret in Mexico City. Her younger sister Beatriz (Derbez) studies in an expensive private school, paid by Mercedes. Obviously, young Beatriz doesn't know about her sister's job. Troubles begin when Mercedes wins a danzon contest with Paco (Acosta), her pimp. Paco refuses to share the prize with Mercedes, so she steals the money when he's sleeping.

programme.title: Frida
programme.desc: The most prominent female painter of Latin America, Frida Kahlo, is agonizing in her Coyoacán home. She evokes memories of her childhood, of the streetcar accident that caused her terrible pain and affliction, her friendship with Trotsky and painter Alfaro Siqueiros, her marriage to Diego Rivera, her miscarriage, her political commitment, her love affairs and the anticipated exhibition of her works.

programme.title: Chantaje amoroso
programme.desc: Victoria le pide el divorcio a Nelson. Paula le dice a Cristina q encontró a victoria en su cama. Cristina hace escándalo a victoria y termina con el. Nelson chantajea a Aníbal.

programme.title: El regalo
programme.desc: Victoria decide irse a la Hda. Cristina quiere irse a el depa de Paula. Niki hiere a Guzmán. Nelson termina con Kendra. Beatriz busca alojo. Espanto contacta a Kendra.

programme.title: Arrepentimiento
programme.desc: Kendra amenaza a salcero. Jean Marie dice estar enamorado de Stefano. Beatriz y Felipe recogen a Guillo. Leo enfurese. Polita se mete at cuarto de Guzmán. Niki la ve. Kendra toma pastillas.

programme.title: Posible accidente
programme.desc: Víctoria se cae del caballo en la Hda. Ella le regala un medalla a Arriaga. Niki invita a un amigo por revancha a Guzmán. Kendra es llevada al hospital para revivirla. Cristina pelea con Lili.

programme.title: Matrimonio de apariencia
programme.desc: Por Niki Victoria aparenta seguir con Nelson. Lili pide vivir con Arriaga en la mansión. Cristina hace un escándalo yLuego escucha una conversación y se arrepiente.

programme.title: Wife's Double Life
programme.desc: When a young husband is thrown in jail for the murder of his newlywed wife, most people in their small Oklahoma community believed the case was solved. But odd cell tower records and surprising DNA evidence force investigators to take a second look.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: In St. Petersburg, Florida, Cabretti Wheeler and his friend Kyle Ellis are killed. When the only eye-witness vanishes, it's up to Cabretti's mom, Lisa Wheeler, to help police solve the case, even if it means risking her own life for justice.

programme.title: Speaking from the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret Purk is just days away from having her first baby when, after an apparent suicide by hanging, she and her unborn son are dead. Twenty-four years later, new clues lead investigators to re-open the case. Was this suicide actually a homicide?

programme.title: The Vanishing Clerk
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Eyes Like Daddy
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Something in the Water
programme.desc: The lifeless body of a young mother-to-be is dumped in the shallow waters of a fishing pond. The crime scene offers few clues, but the case heats up when detective Rod Demery learns of a frightening secret that was kept from the police.

programme.title: The Boogie Man
programme.desc: Two children witness a couple of men who attempt to commit a push in robbery of their mom and her boyfriend, which ends up going south when instead of robbing one of them shoots the couple, killing mom.

programme.title: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: An abandoned car belonging to missing sailor Nicholas Cox turns up in a parking lot. Inside, Demery uncovers a grisly cache of blood evidence, but no Cox. In order to find justice for him, he must first locate his body.

programme.title: Looking for Love
programme.desc: Veteran Drexelle McBride, member of the American Legion Post in Shreveport, is found dead in his van in the parking lot by manager Laurie as she is closing up for the evening. Rod Demery is called out to investigate.

programme.title: The Woman in the Leopard Print Dress
programme.desc: J.W. Fuller is stabbed to death after a drunken fight in a local bar. Detective Demery finds a clue in the victim's chest pocket, leading him on a search for a mystery woman in a leopard print dress.

programme.title: Bodón loco
programme.desc: La trabajadora social descubre que Pedro y Cris no están casados, por lo que, para conservar a su hija, deberán organizar la boda en 24 horas. ¿Crees que con la ayuda de los vecinos podrán realizar un bodón loco?

programme.title: Desazolve
programme.desc: Neighbors face problems with water pressure and need to unblock the pipes, but opt to invest the money in lottery tickets. Morris, on the other hand, is influenced by reggaeton.

programme.title: Ruido fantasma
programme.desc: Los vecinos escuchan un ruido estremecedor en el edificio y sospechan que es un fantasma, por lo que deciden realizar un ritual para expulsarlo. Mientras tanto, Morris busca empleo.

programme.title: Nos cayó la chaviza
programme.desc: Uno de los departamentos está en renta y Sofi, una chava muy positiva, tiene interés en rentarlo. Pero, ¿crees que los vecinos accedan a tener una nueva inquilina? Por otro lado, Luis y Silvia tendrán diferencias por Sandro, la ex pareja de Silvia.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Día del niño
programme.desc: El Día del Niño llega y los vecinos se organizan para festejar en el edificio. Cada uno propone un acto para divertir a los pequeños y cada departamento aportará una cantidad de dinero. Sin embargo, Luis será el más afectado.

programme.title: Vecindad
programme.desc: Unos extranjeros que viven al lado del edificio buscan conocer la cultura mexicana, así que Doña Magda aprovecha para mostrarles que cada vecino tiene algo que enseñar a cambio de dinero. Checa hasta dónde llegará Doña Magda por obtener ganancias.

programme.title: Las tortas de mi primo
programme.desc: Un coach motivacional llega a la vida de Luis para intentar calmar su mal humor. Además, el primo de Germán llega de visita con tortas ahogadas de Guadalajara, y todos querrán la receta de su salsa, haciendo lo que sea por obtenerla.

programme.title: La casa de los riojosos
programme.desc: Un clásico entre América y Guadalajara desata una pelea entre Luis y Pedro. Averigua cómo terminará este conflicto. Además, los vecinos apoyarán a su favorito. Descubre si la relación entre ambos podrá recuperarse.

programme.title: La carnita y la mudanza
programme.desc: Por fin algo que jamás se pensaba ha sucedido, pues Lorena y Magda hacen alianzas para que Sofi, la nueva inquilina, se mude de la forma más tranquila posible. Además, el jefe de Arturo acude a su casa para comer con ellos.

programme.title: Cita de cata
programme.desc: Luis organiza una cata de vinos para impresionar a su jefe, pero los vecinos podrían arruinarlo. Liz ayuda a Vanesa a encontrar pareja por una aplicación.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Nueva chamba
programme.desc: Luis recibe una oferta para ser director general, pero en Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas. Descubre qué decisión tomará. Mientras tanto, Alejandra busca la oportunidad de que la despidan y hará todo lo posible para lograrlo. Descubre si su plan funcionará.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: The Elevator Story
programme.desc: The Bunkers are celebrating Edith's birthday at an Italian restaurant in the city when Archie discovers that Edith failed to mail out a payment to the insurance company. This leads him to run across the street to drop it off. However, on his way he gets stuck in an elevator along with a pregnant Puerto Rican and her husband, an aging hippie, and an erudite black businessman.

programme.title: Archie And The Fbi
programme.desc: A man shows up at the Bunker's door claiming to be a government agent and begins asking questions about Larry Grundy, a neighbor of the Bunkers. Archie soon becomes paranoid when he receives a phone call from a neighbor saying that Archie too is being investigated. As paranoia overwhelms him, Archie becomes convinced that he's being watched that perhaps the house is bugged.

programme.title: Archie Sees A Mugging
programme.desc: Archie and Mike head down to the store to get some items and on the way out Archie witnesses a mugging. Archie doesn't want to get involved in the matter and refuses to tell the police what he saw. However, when he is forced to get involved, he embellishes his story, citing that the mugging was an attempted mafia hit.

programme.title: Mike's Mysterious Son
programme.desc: Edith answers the door to find a woman on the stoop with a young boy. The woman casually mentions that she's dropping Mike's son off and promptly leaves. Edith now finds herself in the awkward position of explaining to the rest of the family where the boy came from. When he finds out, a stunned Mike doesn't know what to say, but does admit to Gloria that he had been intimate with the boy's mother.

programme.title: Archie & Edith Alone
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for eight days to spend some time in a commune, leaving Archie and Edith to spend some quality time together. Archie and Edith settle down for a quiet game of cards but when she lets him win, Archie insults her and they get into a big fight. Edith refuses to forgive Archie until he apologizes.

programme.title: Edith Gets A Mink
programme.desc: Edith gets a package in the mail and discovers that it is a mink cape sent to her as a 'thank you' gift by her Cousin Amelia for Edith taking care of her after a surgery. When Archie sees the cape, he is furious (since he takes it the wrong way) and demands that she give it back. However, that's when the cape is ruined in an accident and Archie sees a chance to make a three-hundred-dollar profit.

programme.title: Sammy's Visit
programme.desc: To get some extra cash, Archie has gotten a job driving a taxi for Bert Munson. Archie is in for a big surprise when one of his passengers turns out to be Sammy Davis Jr. Sammy inadvertently leaves his briefcase behind and arrangements are made for him to retrieve the briefcase at the Bunker house. As usual, Archie's ignorance and bigotry are full force as he nervously awaits Sammy's arrival.

programme.title: Edith, The Judge
programme.desc: One Sunday afternoon, Archie comes home from the laundromat in fury. It seems that he overloaded one of the machines causing the machine to eat his clothes and cause a flood. The irate proprietor of the laundromat, soon stops by the Bunker home to get Archie to pay for the damages but Archie refuses. Soon Edith is called in to act as judge to decide who is at fault in the matter.

programme.title: Archie Is Jealous
programme.desc: Gloria is reading over an old love letter that Mike had sent her. This leads to a conversation between Gloria and Edith concerning an old flame of Edith's with whom she once spent a weekend. However, when Archie hears of Edith's supposed innocent weekend, he hits the roof and demands that Edith not keep any secrets from him.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Edith's cousin, Maude, invites Archie and Edith to the wedding of her daughter, Carol. However, Carol and Maude are not looking forward to Archie, since the man she is marrying happens to be Jewish. Later, the men and the women have their respective bachelor and bachelorette parties, but a grumpy Archie decides to stay in the motel. Meanwhile, Carol realizes just what her fiancée envisions as married life.

programme.title: Archie And The Editorial
programme.desc: Archie gets fed up with a television editorial when this week's issue concerns gun control. Archie rails against gun control, battles it out with Mike and ultimately decides to go on the TV show with a rebuttal. Later, Archie meets his two biggest supporters -a pair of stickup artist who rob him at gunpoint.

programme.title: Archie's Fraud
programme.desc: Archie's Sunday job, driving taxi cabs for Bert Munson, has been a fine extra job for additional income. However, Archie has failed to report the extra income on his tax returns. Archie goes down to the IRS to explain, and soon discovers that he will be audited by the IRS. Trying to get out of it, Archie considers bribing the agent.

programme.title: Gloria And The Riddle
programme.desc: Gloria has become friends with a girl named Tammy and they have been organizing a Women's Fair. Male chauvinism is put to the test when Gloria poses a riddle to Mike and Archie who are stumped when they can't come up with the answer. Archie even goes to his drinking buddies for help, but to no avail. However, it is Edith who suddenly comes up with the answer (an answer that Archie doesn't want to hear).

programme.title: MeatEater - Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gobbling: California Turkeys
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mud and Trees
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Parker Hall hosts Steve in Missouri for a weekend of chasing giant flathead catfish and gray squirrels along the Missouri River.

programme.title: MeatEater - Blue Mountain Bugles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis head into the wilds of eastern Washington’s Blue Range for an action-packed archery elk hunt. Janis calls multiple bulls into close range, and Steve connects on a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his friends Ryan Callaghan and Steve Kendrot join up for a Chesapeake Bay adventure as they pursue blue crabs and sika deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ghosts of the Chesapeake Part 2
programme.desc: The adventure in Maryland continues as the guys have a successful sika deer hunt and throw an East Shore crab boil with local oysters and a homemade smoked sika deer ham.

programme.title: MeatEater - Turkey Troubles
programme.desc: Steve and Janis Putelis escort first-time hunters Tracy and Maggie on a Montana turkey hunt. Emotions run high as the new hunters deal with failures and successes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Borderland Bucks Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and friends Ryan Callaghan and Mark Kenyon head south of the border in search of Coues deer on an old Mexican ranch that feels lost to time.

programme.title: MeatEater - Borderland Bucks Part 2
programme.desc: An action-filled hunt in Mexico leads to a surplus of venison, so locals teach the guys how to produce wild game tamales from scratch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Walking In The Clouds
programme.desc: Steve and his brother Danny endure miserable weather in the glaciated high country of the Alaska Range as they search for a Dall sheep ram.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Black Bear
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve introduces Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack in Prince of Wales, Alaska where they fish for cod, set shrimp pots and hunt for black bears.

programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks in.

programme.title: What a Day (SCOTUS: Don't Give US Your Huddled Masses)
programme.desc:
As so many World Cup fans are discovering ranch dressing and enjoying their visits to the U.S., the Supreme Court left a very different message for people who come to the U.S. for safety and protection: leave. In two 6-3 decisions today, the Supreme Court ruled that the Trump Administration can block asylum seekers at the border and withdraw deportation protections from immigrants fleeing violence and war in their home countries. For more on how the Court’s decisions will shape future U.S. immigration policy, we spoke to Andrea Flores. She’s a former Homeland Security official under Presidents Barack Obama and Joe Biden, and the founder of Securing America’s Promise, a pro-immigration newsletter.
And in headlines, the White House formally requests $87.6 billion mostly to replenish the Pentagon , what the U.S. is doing to help after deadly earthquakes in Venezuela, and a new AP-NORC survey says most Americans are inundated with scam attempts on a daily basis. But you probably already knew that — just check your texts.

programme.title: Runaway Country with Alex Wagner (Trump Loses His Base)
programme.desc: Take one poll with a grain of salt, but what about a TON of polls? From white middle class voters, to rural Americans, and even Evangelicals, the numbers show that Trump is losing his most ardent supporters. This week Alex speaks to “The Clean Clothing Chick” Hannah Dunning, who explains why MAHA is disappointed with the president. Then she’s joined by the Bulwark’s Jonathan V. Last to find out what we can take away from Trump’s flailing public support, losing Iran deal, and stalled agenda.

programme.title: Hysteria (Choice Words with Franchesca Ramsey)
programme.desc: Franchesca Ramsey joins Erin and Alyssa to dig into Peter Thiel’s secret society leak, the 4-year anniversary of the Dobbs decision, and the TPUSA Women’s leadership summit. Alyssa shared her experience attending the star-studded opening of the Obama Center. Then they wrap with a petty conversation about Tulsi Gabbard, Trump’s health, and TV journalist drama.

programme.title: What a Day (SCOTUS: Don't Give US Your Huddled Masses)
programme.desc:
As so many World Cup fans are discovering ranch dressing and enjoying their visits to the U.S., the Supreme Court left a very different message for people who come to the U.S. for safety and protection: leave. In two 6-3 decisions today, the Supreme Court ruled that the Trump Administration can block asylum seekers at the border and withdraw deportation protections from immigrants fleeing violence and war in their home countries. For more on how the Court’s decisions will shape future U.S. immigration policy, we spoke to Andrea Flores. She’s a former Homeland Security official under Presidents Barack Obama and Joe Biden, and the founder of Securing America’s Promise, a pro-immigration newsletter.
And in headlines, the White House formally requests $87.6 billion mostly to replenish the Pentagon , what the U.S. is doing to help after deadly earthquakes in Venezuela, and a new AP-NORC survey says most Americans are inundated with scam attempts on a daily basis. But you probably already knew that — just check your texts.

programme.title: Strict Scrutiny (BREAKING: SCOTUS Sides with Trump Paving Way to Deport Millions of Legal Immigrants)
programme.desc: In this emergency episode, Kate, Melissa, and Leah unpack the two major immigration opinions handed down by SCOTUS today. The brutal TL;DR, courtesy of Justice Sotomayor: “The consequences of today’s decision are predictable. More people will die.”

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Has The Left Finally Figured Out the Internet?)
programme.desc: Ever heard a popular TikToker wax poetic about who they’re voting for? They might be getting paid…and not disclosing by whom. Kyle Tharp, author of the Chaotic Era newsletter, joins Offline to discuss the emergence of pay-for-play political influencers and whether Democrats have made any progress in figuring out the internet. He and Jon talk about the decline of Ben Shapiro and the Daily Wire, the new success of legacy media on TikTok, and the intense grassroots anger around data centers.

programme.title: Offline with Jon Favreau (Why You Should Love America)
programme.desc: Progressives are highly critical of America, and for good reason. But we are losing more than problematic idols and ideals when we abandon patriotism. Jerusalem Demsas, founder and editor of “The Argument,” argues that if we’re going to save America, we’ll have to start loving it first. She joins Offline to explain how liberals have ceded patriotism to the right, why No Kings is starting to fix this, and how to talk about our country’s issues without undermining hope that America still holds promise.

programme.title: This F*cking Guy (Sam Altman: Everything You Didn't Know About His Sh*tty Past)
programme.desc: In our 35th episode of This F*cking Guy, Erin and Alyssa dive deep into the past of the AI Scammer, Sam Altman. From his early tech bro days at Loopt and Y Combinator, to getting a thrill by playing “God" with AI decision-making, to acting VERY shady about the death of an OpenAI employee, this may be our most disingenuous guy yet!

programme.title: Hazel's Tax Deduction
programme.desc: The Internal Revenue Service investigates George's tax refund when Hazel claims he didn't deduct enough for her services to his clients.

programme.title: Mr. B. On The Bench
programme.desc: George is offered a judicial position by Arnold Winters (Willis Bouchey), a prominent judge. He considers accepting it, until he realizes Hazel has spread all over town that he is already a judge.

programme.title: License To Wed
programme.desc: Deirdre's daughter Nancy (Davey Davison) is dating Hazel's nephew Eddie and it looks like they plan to marry. Deirdre does not want this since she thinks Eddie is not good enough for her daughter. Hazel thinks they are still too young to marry and uses psychology to prevent it.

programme.title: Genie With The Light Brown Lamp
programme.desc: The Baxters lose their dog Smiley on a road trip. Hazel reads Harold a bedtime story about Aladdin and the Magic Lamp. The next day he sees a gravy boat in a store window and thinks it is a magic lamp. Great things begin to happen for the family and Harold thinks it is because of the lamp.

programme.title: The Natural Athlete
programme.desc: George becomes jealous that Harold idolizes Hazel's championship bowling streak, so George secretly takes bowling lessons under an assumed name. Bill Zuckert appears as a bowling instructor.

programme.title: New Man In Town
programme.desc: Hazel and Rosie fall all over themselves, competing for the affections of a handsome Latin chauffeur (Robert Lowery), and ignoring other suitors.

programme.title: Herbert For Hire
programme.desc: The Johnson's are having some financial problems. Hazel refuses to make any more brownies for Mr. Griffin until he gives Mr. Johnson a job, despite the latter's lone credential being his degree in ancient languages.

programme.title: Hazel And The Lovebirds
programme.desc: Deirdre allows her daughter Nancy to move back from private school on the condition that she date someone other than Hazel's nephew, Eddy. Susan Silo appears as Gabriella, the Johnson's new maid. Robert Hogan appears as Bud, a gas station attendant that Deirdre also won't let Nancy date.

programme.title: Top Secret
programme.desc: Hazel takes Stan's daughter to meet a visiting senator (Larry Gates), but the girl inadvertently walks out with highly classified documents.

programme.title: The Sunshine Girls Quartette
programme.desc: Hazel, Rosie (Maudie Prickett) and a pair of Sunshine Girls team with Mitch (Dub Taylor) to form a musical group. However, a surprise birthday party for Mr. Griffin prevents Hazel from attending an audition in front of a traveling talent scout (Jean Willes).

programme.title: A Good Example For Harold
programme.desc: George uses a white lie to get out of meeting with an insurance agent. When Hazel catches Harold using the same type of white lie, she says everyone has to stop using lies. Hazel then has to tell Mr. Boyle (Philip Ober), the creator of cleaning product and a potential client for George, that the product doesn't work.

programme.title: Hazel's Highland Fling
programme.desc: Hazel attempts to stop Mr. Griffin from continually inviting himself for dinner because his new Scottish cook Angie is bad. She came to America to find her longtime boyfriend Gordie (James Doohan) and Hazel helps reunite the two of them.

programme.title: Ain't Walter Nice?
programme.desc: When Hazel's nephew Walter (Frank Aletter), a self-described promoter, arrives with hopes of obtaining a large investment from Mr. Griffin, George and Dorothy begin to question his motives.

programme.title: Lady Killer
programme.desc: A sexploitation empire is threatened when its nude centerfold models are mysteriously murdered in "Lady Killer," on "Charlie's Angels."

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Two Army officers profiting from drug purchases murder in order to protect their scheme as "Bullseye" airs on "Charlie's Angels." A recruit in the Women's Army Corps is shot to death on the firing range and Charlie's Angels are assigned to investigate. Bosley works undercover as a civilian researcher with Sabrina as an Array nurse and Jill and Kelly as new enlistees. A military physician and a cruel drill instructor are discovered to be purchasing large quantities of cheap, inactive drugs and reselling them to the Army at top quality retail prices. Unfortunately, before the Angels can complete their investigation, they become the targets of a "search--and-destroy" mission. Kate Jackson, Farrah Fawcett and Jaclyn Smith star as the Angels, Sabrina, Jill and Kelly, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: Consenting Adults
programme.desc: A computer dating service, fronting for prostitutes and their robber accomplices, starts an underworld war by stealing hot diamonds from a syndicate courier in "The Consenting Adults" on "Charlie's Angels." A prostitute supplied by a computer dating service keeps an antique dealer preoccupied while his store is burglarized of priceless art objects. One of the stolen items is a ceramic frog, stuffed with smuggled diamonds -- belonging to a ruthless crime syndicate boss. Thinking he is lying about the thefts, the enraged kingpin kidnaps the antique dealers and Charlie's Angels enter the case. Jill infiltrates the dating service posing as a hooker but finds that the prostitute involved in the burglary has led the crime boss to the diamonds. In a last ditch effort to gain evidence, Angels Sabrina and Jill disguise themselves as veterinarians and steal the syndicate chieftain's championship racehorse. The chieftain agrees to meet the Angels in a park and turn over the diamonds in exchange for his horse. In the exciting climax, Angel Jill must make a getaway with the evidence on her skateboard -- chased by a syndicate hit man Kate Jackson, Farrah Fawcett and Jaclyn Smith star as the Angels, Sabrina, Jill and Kelly, respectively, who work for Charlie, an unseen and very sophisticated boss who phones in their instructions. David Doyle stars as Bosley, Charlie's harried assistant.

programme.title: The Youth Center
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Oliver's School Girl Crush
programme.desc: Oliver is asked to speak at the local high school about his illustrious law career and makes quite an impression on student Kathy Baxter. Oliver must contend with Kathy's fawning as well as her jealous boyfriend is not very happy with Oliver.

programme.title: Ralph's Nuptials
programme.desc: Hank Kimball proposes marriage to lady carpenter Ralph Monroe while under the influence of heavy medication. Lisa plans an amazing country wedding only to find out that, Sam, the Justice of the Peace, has forgotten to new his license.

programme.title: Oliver And The Cornstalk
programme.desc: Oliver plants his crops, worrying that they haven't been planted in time for a harvest. Lisa tries to be helpful and mixes up a batch of sour lemonade. Oliver pours out the bitter elixir in the newly planted field, with an unimaginable consequence.

programme.title: Beauty Is Skin Deep
programme.desc: Sam Drucker does not stock any cosmetics in his store, much to the chagrin of Lisa. Lisa decides to set up a "small" display in the store. When the merchandise is delivered, it forces Mr. Drucker to retreat to the front porch.

programme.title: The Wishbook
programme.desc: Mr. Haney discovers an old wish book dating back to 1898 that tells the story of Calvin and Tessie Whittaker who once owned the Douglases' farm and how Calvin traveled to Hollywood to pitch his idea of putting a mouse named Dickey into films.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Bundle Of Joy
programme.desc: Oliver goes to New York to finish up a case at his old firm. Meanwhile back on the farm, Lisa and Eb find a puppy left on the doorstep. Lisa, in all her innocence, leads Oliver to believe the puppy, affectionally named Freddie, is a human baby.

programme.title: The Ex-Con
programme.desc: Oliver has been invited to give a speech at the Bar Association. He is there to advocate for the hiring of ex-convicts. He eventually ends up regretting his speech when he is forced to hire an ex-convict by the name of Willie Dunhill.

programme.title: The Cow Killer
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: The Confrontation
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: The Case Of The Hooterville Refund Fraud
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: The Picnic
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: The Beeping Rock
programme.desc: Local boy Dinky Watson has one heck of a story to tell anyone who will listen. When Dinky convinces Lisa to buy a "moon rock" for the considerable sum of $14, Oliver suspects that she is the victim of a practical joke.

programme.title: Uncle Fedor
programme.desc: When Lisa's Uncle Fedor comes to visit her at the farm, he is visibly upset. He claims that someone is following him. Indeed, Fedor is convinced that the Secret Police are out to steal back a valuable scientific formula, which only he knows.

programme.title: The Wealthy Landowner
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Oliver is upset when he finds out Arnold the pig and he share the same birthday. Jealous that Arnold is getting more attention than he is, Oliver becomes convinced that Lisa is throwing him a surprise party and drives all over town in search for it.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Gomez, The Reluctant Lover
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Feud In The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney, to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: Gomez, The Cat Burglar
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: Portrait Of Gomez
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: Morticia's Dilemma
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter, Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: Christmas With The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fill in for him.

programme.title: Uncle Fester, Tycoon
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: Morticia & Gomez Vs. Fester & Grandmama
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: Fester Goes On A Diet
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Great Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: Ophelia Finds Romance
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: Pugsley's Allowance
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: Happy Birthday, Grandma Frump
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton) comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: Morticia, The Decorator
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: Ophelia Visits Morticia
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: Addams Cum Laude
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: How To Find Direction When Nothing Feels Right
programme.desc: From 6× Mr. Olympia to full-time business owner and stay-at-home dad, it’s safe to say Chris Bumstead’s been enjoying retired life. So what’s he been up to this past year, what’s changed most for him, and what’s he looking forward to next? Expect to learn how retirement is going for Cbum, if Cbum would have retired last year even if he didn’t win, how Chris learned to sit and process his emotions, if Cbum regrets retirement and if he misses the competing yet, how Chris plans on leveling up for baby Bumstead number two, he hardest part of losing that “Mr. Olympia structure” in daily life, if Chris ever plans on returning the stage again, and much more…

programme.title: The Most Important Daily Habits For Health & Longevity
programme.desc: Determining the best actions to take for enhancing our health and extending our lives has grown more challenging. There are an unlimited number of wellness approaches at our disposal, thankfully Dr Patrick has dedicated her professional life to identifying the most evidence-based strategies for improving our health and longevity. Expect to learn if low omega 3s are worse for you than smoking cigarettes, what Rhonda's thoughts are on vaping and nicotine, the best foods to boost your metabolism, the once a week workout that can de-age your heart by 20 years, how to get the benefits of heat exposure if you don't have a sauna, the terrifying health risks of being too sedentary and much more...

programme.title: Why Fear & Horror Feels Kinda Good
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to fear? This fascination often balances us the edge of life and death, infused with a dash of excitement. From his beginnings as a Navy SEAL to becoming a renowned YouTuber, Mr. Ballen possesses a unique storytelling talent. He captivates us with some of the most spine-chilling true stories, drawn both from his experiences and the lives of others. Expect to learn why so many people are obsessed with True Crime and scary stories, the 3 terrifying but true stories MrBallen has prepared in this episode today, what being a NAVY Seal taught MrBallen about life & the backlash he has gotten from the NAVY Seal community by sharing his story, what it means to live a good life, if there is life after death, how to reinvent your entire life, what it takes to tell a good story and much more...
